Not a balance sheet cash balance.

Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

candidates.why: Current financing debt, but likely only a component of short-term debt.
Current borrowing component, but not complete if current maturities also exist.

candidates.row_label: Other short term borrowings excluding overdraft
candidates.why: Same concept as above but appears blank in preview; likely alternate-period label.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt, but supplemental and may overlap with current borrowings total.
Could be a clean total, but appears blank in preview and may not be the reported line used here.
Cash flow movement, not balance sheet debt stock.

Appears in the current liabilities section and is the cleanest reported current interest-bearing debt total; preferred over summing components to avoid double counting. Excludes lease liabilities via separate lease line.

final_choice.row_label: Other short term borrowings excluding overdraft
Current instalments of loans and borrowings

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clean reported current debt total in the balance sheet. Avoided combining current instalments/overdrafts/other short-term borrowings to reduce double counting. Excluded lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact total PPE line; preferred over component lines.
Component of PPE, not the full total because land/buildings and construction in progress are separate.

candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex item, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.why: Cash flow disposal item, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.why: Best match to net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.
